shows.name: Grand Jubilee
shows.desc: Branson's longest-running show! High-energy variety with comedy & live band.

shows.name: Presleys' Country Jubilee
shows.desc: 50+ year Branson tradition! Country music, comedy, and gospel. The show that started it all.

shows.name: Clay Cooper's Country Express
shows.desc: High-energy country variety with comedy, dancing, and 20+ performers.

shows.name: The Haygoods
shows.desc: 6 siblings, 20+ genres, incredible music & dancing. A Branson powerhouse.

shows.name: Hughes Music Show
shows.desc: The Hughes Brothers & family — stunning harmonies and variety entertainment.

shows.name: Pierce Arrow
shows.desc: Country music, comedy, and the legendary low bass voice.

shows.name: SIX
shows.desc: 6 brothers — all vocals, no instruments. Viral sensation with incredible harmonies.

shows.name: Bohemian Queen
shows.desc: The ultimate Freddie Mercury tribute! Full costume changes & all the Queen hits.

shows.name: Legends in Concert
shows.desc: World-famous tribute show! Multiple artists per show — Elvis, Garth, Abba & more.

shows.name: Back to the Bee Gees
shows.desc: Brand new show! Disco tribute — Stayin' Alive & all the hits.

shows.name: Dean Z — Ultimate Elvis
shows.desc: The world's best Elvis tribute artist. Authentic costumes and voice.

shows.name: Sight & Sound — DAVID
shows.desc: Epic biblical production! Massive sets, live animals, incredible storytelling. Branson's #1 production show.

shows.name: Shepherd's Wild West Showdown
shows.desc: Stunt show! Trick riding, gunfights, and comedy western action.

shows.name: Amazing Acrobats — Shanghai Circus
shows.desc: Mind-blowing Chinese acrobatics, contortion, and aerial acts.

shows.name: Dolly Parton's Stampede
shows.desc: 4-course feast with 32 horses, trick riding, and musical spectacle.

shows.name: Chuckwagon Dinner Show
shows.desc: Cowboy supper + live country music and comedy show.

shows.name: Showboat Branson Belle
shows.desc: 2-hour cruise + meal + live show on a 700-seat paddle wheeler.

shows.name: Rick Thomas — Mansion of Dreams
shows.desc: Vegas-level illusionist! Award-winning magic, comedy, and grand illusions.

shows.name: Comedy Jamboree
shows.desc: Slapstick comedy, music, and family-friendly laughs.

shows.name: Branson Dinner Trains
shows.desc: 4-course dinner on a vintage train through the Ozark foothills.

shows.name: Branson Duck Tours
shows.desc: Amphibious vehicle tour — land AND water! Splash into Table Rock Lake.

shows.name: Freedom Journey Experience
shows.desc: Immersive walk-through experience of America's founding.

tip: Most shows run Tue–Sat. Book 2-3 days ahead for best seats. Matinees (2-3 PM) are less crowded. Children under 12 often free or discounted.
